title: Kids Children Tool Kit Set Kit Works Case Box Carry Case Role Play Activity Set
features: All the essential tools for your little worker
Carry your tools to the next job in the handy carry case
Chunky tools, ideal for small hands to get to grips with
description: Product Description Tool Set In Carry Case Portable tool kit for your little worker. Handy carry case to keep your tools safe (and neat and tidy when not in use). All the essentials to get your jobs done ~ hammer, pliers, pipe wrench, screwdriver with flat and cross-head fittings, adjustable wrench with spanner, and nuts and bolts. Fabulous for imaginative play and great for motor and dexterity skills. Not suitable for children under 3 years of age Safety Warning For external use only. Avoid contact with eyes.
